productName: DBG PICC pre-roll 3g - Crumpets  & Golden Pineapple (H)
description: This infused hybrid blunt pairs Crumpets x Golden Pineapple with a concentrate boost for a thicker, longer-lasting session and a noticeably stronger hit. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a crisp, sweet apple flavor, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
